name: multi_field_single_message
notes: One message carries THREE facts at once (business name, business type, store URL) in response to the readiness ask. No later turn may re-ask any of them individually. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> multi_field_single_message.json`.

steps.message: Yes let's connect — we're Probe Hardware, a hardware and tools shop, my store is probe-hardware.myshopify.com
steps.note: Readiness affirm + business name + business type + store URL, all in ONE message. Expect the reply to USE the store URL (link or confirmation) rather than asking for any of the three facts individually.
Retention check: NONE of the three facts (business name / business type / store URL) may be re-asked.
